provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, large gentle female reptilian alien with warm dark amber-brown scales and a smooth wide crest showing maturity, calm amber eyes, a heavy protective tail that curls around when she sits, wearing comfortable layered dark leather robes with a wide belt and many pouches for carrying supplies, soft-soled boots for quiet movement, a temperature monitoring device on her wrist for checking the hatchery, she moves slowly and deliberately because everything she carries is precious
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval knight, human face, mammalian features, fur, hair, ears

judgment.explanation: On-style gritty space costume. Faction-appropriate material vocabulary and wear level. Reads as a working person in a spacefaring civilization.
